    • isPlayerONScreem

      boolean isPlayerONScreem(int worldX, int worldY, int tilesize, int playerX, int playerY, int width, int height)
      Checks if is player ON screem.
      Parameters:
      worldX - the world X
      worldY - the world Y
      tilesize - the tilesize
      playerX - the player X
      playerY - the player Y
      width - the width
      height - the height
      Returns:
      true, if is player ON screem
